player_news.summary: Knox is listed as probable with a minor ankle issue, and the Lakers may trim his workload with the playoffs one week away.
Frost has picked up second-unit creation duties and his minutes are rising as Miami sharpens its playoff rotation.
Wynn is expected to be limited if active after returning from a hamstring issue during the final week before fantasy playoffs.
Vance has topped 45 fantasy points in three straight contests as Dallas pushes to improve playoff seeding.
Vale is on the second night of a back-to-back and could see slightly lower usage with postseason preservation in mind.
Mercer draws a favorable interior matchup against a weak rebounding frontcourt in a must-win late-season stretch.

team_news.summary: Los Angeles is managing frontcourt minutes carefully in the final regular-season week before the fantasy playoff bracket starts.
Miami's bench rotation tightened as the club locks in playoff seeding, increasing Caleb Frost's reliability.
